body.notes:
Spun out from T-retire-legacy-direct-reasoner-path inventory 2026-04-19.

## What
main.py:5257 and main.py:6010 both run 'tool-result synthesis' turns — LLM renders a tool's output in natural language with a hard constraint ('report ONLY what tool returned'). These are NOT persona-level reasoning turns. But they call gateway.reason(level='interactive'), which downstream passes role='interactive' to build_system_prompt in openrouter_reasoner.py:398, getting the full fat persona preamble (and the 4800-char truncation that eats the tail). Every tool-synthesis turn pays the persona-prompt token tax unnecessarily.

## Fix
Add `prompt_role: Optional[str] = None` parameter to gateway.reason(); thread through to reasoners; when set, reasoners use that role in build_system_prompt() instead of inferring from level/is_user_turn. At the two synthesis sites, pass `prompt_role='analysis'` (or a new 'synthesis' role if we want it smaller still). No behavior change when param is omitted.

## Why S-sized
Additive change, no existing call sites break. Touches: cognition/inference_gateway.py (gateway.reason sig), cognition/reasoners/openrouter_reasoner.py (line ~398, use the param), cognition/reasoners/ollama_reasoner.py (line ~514, same), main.py 5257 + 6010 (pass the new param). All MEDIUM inertia but additive.

## Impact
Every tool call's synthesis turn gets smaller system prompt → lower tokens → lower OR spend + dodge the truncation issue that's biting the legacy path. Bonus: makes the synthesis turn identifiable in logs (prompt_role='analysis' is traceable).
body.title: Tool-result synthesis turns pay persona-prompt tax — add prompt_role override to gateway.reason
body.result: Shipped f0c9f247. prompt_role override threads through gateway.reason → openrouter_reasoner; both tool-synthesis sites in main.py (5257, 6010) now pass prompt_role='analysis'. Ollama path already used role='analysis'; no change there. All tests at baseline.
